sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16729" key="a)sugke/rastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσυγκέραστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16729.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">untempered,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φύσις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.180</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>(<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
